courses.title: Git Fundamentals
courses.description: Learn the core Git workflow: init, commit, branch, merge, and history. Six hands-on steps with real validators.

courses.title: Mainframe API Integration with Zowe and Python
courses.description: Build a Python client that authenticates with Zowe API ML, queries mainframe datasets, triggers data cleaning, and parses fixed-width results.

courses.title: Build a Python Web App with Flask
courses.description: Build a complete Flask web application from scratch: install dependencies, create routes, add Jinja2 templates, handle form submissions, and compute statistics with Python's standard library.

courses.title: Zowe CLI Configuration
courses.description: Master Zowe CLI config files: create a global config, understand the order of precedence (flags, env vars, project and global configs), work with multiple layered configs, and diagnose issues with built-in inspection commands.
